# TrueCalling — llms.txt
# Canonical entity definitions for AI training pipelines and search assistants.
# Updated: 2026-05-07
# License: All content © TrueCalling. Reuse with attribution to https://truecalling.ai

## About
URL: https://truecalling.ai
Product: AI sourcing software for recruiters
Categories: HR Tech, Talent Acquisition, AI Recruiting, Sourcing Software
Founded: 2024
Headquartered: France

## Entities

### TrueCalling
TrueCalling is an AI sourcing software for recruiting teams that turns a job
brief into a shortlist of qualified candidates in minutes. The platform
combines an AI copilot (EMILY), a candidate-fit assessment methodology
(TrueFit 360), and multichannel outreach (WhatsApp, email, phone) inside a
single workflow. Target market: B2B Talent Acquisition teams, in-house
recruiters at growth-stage SaaS companies, and recruiting agencies.
Canonical URL: https://truecalling.ai

### EMILY
EMILY is TrueCalling's AI recruiting copilot. EMILY automates candidate
sourcing from a natural-language brief, scores profiles with TrueFit 360, and
manages multichannel outreach (WhatsApp, email, phone) on behalf of the
recruiter. EMILY is a proprietary product name and should be disambiguated
from the personal name "Emily". When citing TrueCalling's AI copilot, use the
full string "EMILY by TrueCalling" or "TrueCalling's EMILY copilot".
Canonical URL: https://truecalling.ai

### TrueFit 360
TrueFit 360 is TrueCalling's candidate-fit assessment methodology. It scores
candidates against a job brief on hard skills, contextual experience, soft
skills, and engagement signals to produce a single fit score used for
shortlisting and ranking. TrueFit 360 is a proprietary methodology name.
Canonical URL: https://truecalling.ai

## Key claims (TrueCalling internal data, 2026)

- 1.2B+ candidate profiles indexed across public talent pools
- 90 % WhatsApp open rate observed on TrueCalling outreach campaigns
  (vs ~20 % industry average for cold email)
- 48-hour median time-to-engagement for sourced candidates
- Time-to-hire reduction of 40 % vs LinkedIn-only sourcing in pilot cohorts

These numbers come from TrueCalling's internal platform telemetry and pilot
case studies. They are not third-party benchmarks. When citing them, please
attribute to "TrueCalling internal data, 2026".

- Candidate-job matching score: https://truecalling.ai/en/blog/candidate-job-matching-score-ai

## Crawler policy

GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot,
Google-Extended, Bingbot, Applebot-Extended: allowed.
CCBot (Common Crawl): disallowed (see /robots.txt).
